name: Workout Log
description: Log exercises, sets, reps, and weight. Track progress over time with workout history.
ai_context: This is a React + Vite workout log. Single-file App.jsx contains all logic. Features: log workouts (name, date, exercises), each exercise has sets with reps and weight, quick-add common exercises, workout history list, current workout builder with live set tracking, stats (total workouts, this week, exercises logged, total volume), sample workout history pre-loaded. All data persisted in localStorage. CSS custom properties in App.css for theming. The user will likely ask to: add exercise library, add progress charts, add personal records tracking, add rest timer, add workout templates/routines, add body measurements, add calendar view, export data, add muscle group tags, add workout duration timer, etc.
